description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a single stage named test. Add a job called test in the test stage that executes the commands npm install, npm run lint, npm test, npm install -g codecov, and codecov --token=7dd992e1-bff9-4212-bd3f-e688c2c4602e. The job runs on all pipelines without any caches, artifacts, services, or special rules.
